case_title: DISCOVER BANK VS. LAUREN E SWARTZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT [DECLARATION OF DILIGENCE ATTACHED THERETO] (TRANSACTION ID # 65990989), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK SERVED OCT-03-2020, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE OCT-05-2020 AS TO DEFENDANT SWARTZ, LAUREN E

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-27-2020 CONTINUED TO APR-06-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SWARTZ, LAUREN E $8,869.82 PRINCIPAL, $375.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,244.82, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 66216130)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-06-2021 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-27-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
